The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. Additionally, the medications prescribed do not include any that are specifically aimed at managing lipid disorders. Therefore, based on the information provided, there is no indication that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
